verse_text: And he arose and departed to his house.

links.context: This Angel has the authority to forgive sins, for the Father's name is in Him. The Father's name is the Lord; therefore, the Son is also called by this name (AmbM). When He became incarnate, He also forgave sins. But the Jews challenged His authority in vain, because they did not believe He was the Son of God ([[MAT.9:1]]-7).
